segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Good afternoon.
segments.zh: 下午好。我是卡特夫人，负责管理课前和课后的托儿服务。希望大家有机会好好参观学校，和教职工、学生聊一聊。我知道很多家长都对孩子入学后使用我们的托儿服务感兴趣，可能有些人已经有所了解，但为了那些还不清楚的人，我现在详细介绍一下。

words.def: 延长的时间；额外的时间

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: My name's Mrs Carter and I run the before and after school extended hours childcare service.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: I hope you've had a chance to have a good look around the school and talk to staff and pupils.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: I know that many of you are interested in using our childcare service when your child joins the school, and perhaps you already know something about it, but for those that don't, I'll go through the main details now.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: We offer childcare for children from the ages of four to eleven both before and after school.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: I know that many parents who work find this service invaluable.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: You can leave your child with us safe in the knowledge that they will be extremely well cared for.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: We are insured to provide care for up to 70 children, although we rarely have this many attending at any one session.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: I think we generally expect around 50–60 children for the afternoon sessions and about half that number for the breakfast sessions.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Although we currently do have 70 children registered with us, not all of these attend every day.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: It's ten years since we began offering an extended hours service and we've come a long way during that time.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: When we first opened, we only had about 20 children attending regularly.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: We try to keep our costs as low as we can and we think we provide very good value for money.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: For the afternoon sessions, which run from 3.30 until 6 p.m., it's £7.20.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: But if you prefer, you can pay for one hour only, which costs £3.50, or two hours which costs £5.70.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: The cost of the childcare includes food and snacks.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: They'll be given breakfast in the morning and in the afternoon, a healthy snack as soon as they finish school.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: At 5 p.m. children are given something more substantial, such as pasta or a casserole.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Please inform us of any allergies that your child might have and we'll make sure they're offered a suitable alternative.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: As you may know, the childcare service runs through the school holidays from 8 a.m. to 6 p.m.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: We offer a really varied and exciting programme to keep the children entertained – we don't want them to feel as if they are still at school!

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: It will also feel different because they'll get the chance to make new friends with children from other schools – spaces are available for them because a lot of our term-time children don't always attend during the holiday.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: In the past, parents have asked if children over the age of 11 are allowed to come with their younger brothers and sisters – but I'm afraid we're unable to do this because of the type of insurance we have.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: So now let me tell you about some of the activities that your child can do during the after-school sessions.
segments.zh: 现在让我告诉你们孩子放学后可以参加的一些活动。除了可以使用操场设备、电脑和图书馆外，每天通常至少有一项“特别”活动。比如西班牙语。每周四有一位专业老师来，通过游戏和歌曲进行基础语言教学。她分两节课：一节给8岁以上孩子，一节给更小的孩子。这是唯一需要额外收费的活动，但非常值得。

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: As well as being able to use the playground equipment, computers and the library, there is usually at least one 'special' activity that children can do each day.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: For example, Spanish.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: We have a specialist teacher coming in every Thursday to give a basic introduction to the language through games and songs.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: She does two sessions: one for the over 8s and one for the younger children.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: This is the only activity which we have to make an extra charge for – but it's well worth it.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Once a week the children have the opportunity to do some music.
segments.zh: 每周孩子们有一次机会做音乐活动。很幸运，我们有一位员工是民乐乐队成员。周一，她教孩子们唱歌和打击乐。这需要家长的支持，所以如果你们中有人会唱歌或演奏乐器，愿意在这些活动中帮忙，我们会很高兴。

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: We're very lucky that one of our staff is a member of a folk band.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: On Mondays, she teaches singing and percussion to groups of children.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: We do rely on parental support for this, so if any of you sing or play an instrument and would be prepared to help out at these sessions, we'd be delighted.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Painting continues to be one of the most popular activities.
segments.zh: 绘画仍然是最受欢迎的活动之一。起初我们不太愿意提供这项活动，因为会弄得很乱，但孩子们一直要求做艺术，我们最终让步了。艺术有助于孩子们在学校辛苦学习一天后放松。

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: To begin with we weren't keen on offering this because of the extra mess involved, but children kept asking if they could do some art and so we finally gave in.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Art is great for helping the children to relax after working hard at school all day.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Yoga is something that we've been meaning to introduce for some time but haven't been able to find anyone available to teach it – until now that is.
segments.zh: 瑜伽是我们一直想引入的活动，但一直找不到老师来教——直到现在。所以我们会看看效果如何。希望孩子们能从各方面受益。

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: So we'll see how this goes.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Hopefully, children will benefit in all sorts of ways from this.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Cooking is another popular activity.
segments.zh: 烹饪是另一项受欢迎的活动。他们每周做不同种类的蛋糕、披萨或面包。虽然小孩子喜欢做，但我们发现太乱了，所以决定只限8岁以上孩子参加，因为他们更善于自己收拾干净。

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: They make a different sort of cake, or pizza or bread each week.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Although the younger children love doing it, we found that the mess was just too much, so we've decided to restrict this to the over 8s, as they are better able to clean up after themselves.

items.prompt: Also advisable to hire 10 __________ for warmth
Which TWO facts are given about the school's extended hours childcare service?

pairs.note: 题干和原文完全一致，直接定位到服务名称。
题干中的'facts'对应原文的'main details'，表示主要信息。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问关于学校延长托儿服务的事实，原文中Mrs Carter说'I'll go through the main details now'，提示后面是事实，因此定位到该句。

items.prompt: How much does childcare cost for a complete afternoon session per child?
What does the manager say about food?
What is different about arrangements in the school holidays?
What information is given about Spanish?

pairs.note: 题干关键词直接出现在原文中，帮助定位。

pairs.p: We have a specialist teacher coming in every Thursday to give a basic introduction to the language through games and songs. She does two sessions: one for the over 8s and one for the younger children. This is the only activity which we have to make an extra charge for
pairs.note: 原文详细描述了西班牙语课程的信息，包括时间、方式、分组和收费，对应题干问的'information'。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问关于西班牙语的信息，原文在提到Spanish后，用一整段话给出了具体信息，包括老师、时间、教学方式、分组和额外收费，因此定位到该段。

items.prompt: What information is given about Music?

pairs.p: the opportunity to do some music
pairs.note: 题干问关于音乐的信息，原文说有机会做音乐，这是对音乐活动的描述。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问关于音乐的信息，定位句开头提到'do some music'，直接对应音乐话题。

items.prompt: What information is given about Painting?

pairs.note: 题干和原文完全一致，直接定位。

pairs.p: continues to be one of the most popular activities
pairs.note: 题干问关于绘画的信息，原文给出其受欢迎程度。

paraphrase.explain: 题干关键词'Painting'在原文首句出现，直接定位到该句，后续内容即为关于绘画的信息。

items.prompt: What information is given about Yoga?

pairs.note: 题干和原文完全一致，直接定位。

pairs.p: something that we've been meaning to introduce
pairs.note: 题干问'信息'，原文用'介绍的内容'替换。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问关于瑜伽的信息，原文第一句提到瑜伽是打算引入的活动，后面说孩子们会受益，但选项F对应的是'children will benefit'，所以定位到原文中'children will benefit'部分。

items.prompt: What information is given about Cooking?

pairs.note: 题干关键词与原文完全一致，直接定位。
题干问信息，原文给出限制条件，即信息内容。

paraphrase.explain: 通过题干关键词Cooking定位到原文，找到关于Cooking的限制信息：restrict this to the over 8s。
